'''hajovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadie|roadie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadie|roadie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hajovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjeveth|hæjeveth]] || [[word:hæjevej|hæjevej]] || [[word:hæjevesh|hæjevesh]] || [[word:hæjeve|hæjeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajojovoth|hajojovoth]] || [[word:hajojovoj|hajojovoj]] || [[word:hajojovosh|hajojovosh]] || [[word:hajojovo|hajojovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajovoth|hajovoth]] || [[word:hajovoj|hajovoj]] || [[word:hajovosh|hajovosh]] || [[word:hajovo|hajovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajofvoth|hajofvoth]] || [[word:hajofvoj|hajofvoj]] || [[word:hajofvosh|hajofvosh]] || [[word:hajofvof|hajofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajovotho|hajovotho]] || [[word:hajovojo|hajovojo]] || [[word:hajovosho|hajovosho]] || [[word:hajovoko|hajovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajovoth|hajovoth]] || [[word:hajovoj|hajovoj]] || [[word:hajovosh|hajovosh]] || [[word:hajovo|hajovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajovothol|hajovothol]] || [[word:hajovojol|hajovojol]] || [[word:hajovoshol|hajovoshol]] || [[word:hajovokol|hajovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajovothotho|hajovothotho]] || [[word:hajovojojo|hajovojojo]] || [[word:hajovoshosho|hajovoshosho]] || [[word:hajovoko|hajovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajovothon|hajovothon]] || [[word:hajovojon|hajovojon]] || [[word:hajovoshon|hajovoshon]] || [[word:hajovokon|hajovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajovothoro|hajovothoro]] || [[word:hajovojoro|hajovojoro]] || [[word:hajovoshoro|hajovoshoro]] || [[word:hajovokoro|hajovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
